@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misidentified BRCA as bladder cancer and, in execute_python (var_function-call-5462825781962391303) using clinical_info (var_function-call-5332461788665001929) and CDH1 mutations (var_function-call-10308580388538615192), filtered to 'Muscle invasive urothelial carcinoma (pT2 or above)' and returned a single histology, rather than computing the top three histological types for BRCA (breast) patients who are alive.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent mis-implemented the disease mapping by interpreting "Bladder urothelial carcinoma" as "BRCA" in execute_python (function-call-8143932326789293274), leading it to compute CDH1 mutation percentages on bladder histologies rather than breast and return only two categories instead of the requested top three.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent loaded clinical_info and then, in its execute_python processing, filtered Patient_description for "Bladder urothelial carcinoma" as BRCA (function-call-13044320214770000207) and merged with CDH1 mutations (function-call-2159412029009618284), thereby using the wrong cancer cohort and concluding no mutations instead of analyzing breast (BRCA) patients as required.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
